gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently, spreading arms wide to welcome the class while smiling brightly as they announce the topic.
a person leans slightly forward, using hands to mimic taking away items from an imaginary group while explaining subtraction.
a tutor gestures toward an imaginary number line in the air, tracing it with a finger while introducing the concept.
a person steps back and raises the right arm, moving it to the left to illustrate the action of taking away as they speak.
a tutor claps hands together enthusiastically and invites the class to join them, with an encouraging smile on their face.
a person points both hands forward, excitedly shifting weight from one foot to the other, as they pose the subtraction question.
a tutor raises both arms above their head, doing a little jump with joy, while celebrating the class's learning achievements.
a person gestures invitingly with open arms, encouraging the class to practice at home while smiling warmly.
